name: Ego-Robot
caption: The autonomous agent navigating the environment. It is currently positioned in the center of Room 0, equipped with a 360-degree LiDAR and panoramic vision system for real-time spatial reasoning.

name: chair
caption: A modern blue chair crafted from reinforced plastic with a sleek matte finish. Its ergonomic design features a breathable mesh backrest and four lightweight aluminum legs, providing sturdy support for long periods of sitting.
instruction: Go to the modern blue matte-finish plastic chair that features a breathable mesh backrest and four lightweight aluminum legs.

name: table
caption: A heavy green wooden table with a broad, rectangular surface. The wood grain is visible under a thick layer of protective varnish, and the structure is supported by four massive square-shaped timber legs.
instruction: Navigate to the heavy green wooden rectangular table supported by four massive square-shaped timber legs.

name: cabinet
caption: An orange industrial-style cabinet made of cold-rolled steel. It contains three deep sliding drawers with silver metallic handles, commonly used for storing heavy tools or organized office documents in a workshop environment.
instruction: Find the orange industrial-style steel cabinet containing three deep sliding drawers with silver metallic handles.

name: screen
caption: A high-definition purple screen with an ultra-thin bezel. The glossy display is mounted on a flexible wall bracket, showing its capability for tilt adjustment and multi-angle viewing in a modern living space.
instruction: Go to the high-definition purple screen with an ultra-thin bezel that is mounted on a flexible wall bracket.

name: chair
caption: This blue fabric-covered chair features a swivel base with five smooth-rolling casters. It includes adjustable armrests and a high backrest, designed to improve posture during intensive computer-based tasks or gaming sessions.
instruction: Navigate to the blue fabric-covered chair equipped with a swivel base, five smooth-rolling casters, and adjustable armrests.

name: table
caption: A small green side table made of eco-friendly bamboo. It has a minimalist tripod base and a circular top, perfect for holding a single lamp or a cup of coffee near a seating area.
instruction: Find the small green side table made of bamboo with a circular top and a minimalist tripod base.

name: cabinet
caption: A wide orange storage cabinet with frosted glass doors. The interior is divided by adjustable wooden shelves, offering a versatile solution for displaying decorative glassware or storing books away from dust.
instruction: Navigate to the wide orange storage cabinet featuring frosted glass doors and adjustable wooden shelves inside.

name: screen
caption: A massive purple flat-panel screen positioned on a low-profile stand. The dark reflective surface indicates it is likely a high-end OLED display, offering deep contrast and vibrant colors for professional video editing.
instruction: Go to the massive purple OLED flat-panel screen positioned on a low-profile stand.

name: chair
caption: A blue folding chair with a durable steel frame. The seat and backrest are made of weather-resistant nylon, making it highly portable and suitable for both temporary indoor seating and outdoor events.
instruction: Find the blue folding chair built with a durable steel frame and a weather-resistant nylon seat.

name: table
caption: A green glass-top table featuring a unique interlocking metal base. The tempered glass is scratch-resistant and transparent, revealing the complex geometric design of the support structure underneath.
instruction: Navigate to the green glass-top table featuring a transparent surface and a unique interlocking metal base.

name: cabinet
caption: A tall orange wooden cabinet with ornate carvings on its pillars. This traditional piece of furniture offers two large compartments behind solid oak doors, finished with antique brass locks and keyholes.
instruction: Go to the tall orange wooden cabinet with ornate carvings on its pillars and antique brass locks on the oak doors.

name: screen
caption: A compact purple screen with a matte screen surface. It is connected via a standard HDMI cable and is currently powered off, showing a clean, dark facade in a professional workspace.
instruction: Find the compact purple screen with a matte screen surface that is connected via an HDMI cable.

name: chair
caption: A luxury blue velvet chair with deep button tufting. The plush fabric provides a soft texture, while the dark walnut legs add a touch of classic elegance to the corner of the room.
instruction: Navigate to the luxury blue velvet chair featuring deep button tufting and dark walnut legs.

name: table
caption: A long green conference table made of composite materials. It features built-in power outlets and cable management tracks, designed to accommodate multiple users during collaborative group meetings.
instruction: Go to the long green conference table that features built-in power outlets and cable management tracks.

name: cabinet
caption: A slim orange cabinet designed to fit into tight corners. It has a vertical orientation with five separate cubby holes, providing an efficient way to organize small items or personal belongings.
instruction: Find the slim orange vertical cabinet designed for corners, containing five separate cubby holes.
